messages.content:
给我的加拿大移民律师发一封英文邮件：以防您没看WhatsApp群消息，提醒您两件事 1.  您上封邮件要求的“Attached is an excel sheet for security screening and individual mandamus applications. Please have one of you to fill it up, organize and send it to me so we continue with individual mandamus applications.” 已经填好了，请在https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-s75SXLNee0GR5zf7WTfXArzfzD_oe0x/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=108377802030614155340&rtpof=true&sd=true 里面查看，
2.  关于之前探讨的CBSA Mandamus，如果您还没file的话，我想请您等到我个人IRCC强制令IMM-25909-25收到Respondent’s Argument of Memo之后再file CBSA Mandamus，这样能保证RMOA里面不会被IRCC指控司法滥用，如果您已经交了CBSA Mandamus，那也没关系没啥事。

Subject: Follow-up: Completed spreadsheet + timing of potential CBSA mandamus

Dear [Lawyer’s Name],

In case you didn’t see the message in our WhatsApp group, I wanted to follow up on two items:

1) **Excel sheet for security screening / individual mandamus applications**  
Regarding your last email (“Attached is an excel sheet for security screening and individual mandamus applications. Please have one of you to fill it up, organize and send it to me so we continue with individual mandamus applications.”), the spreadsheet has been completed.  
Please review it here:  
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-s75SXLNee0GR5zf7WTfXArzfzD_oe0x/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=108377802030614155340&rtpof=true&sd=true

2) **CBSA mandamus timing**  
On the CBSA mandamus we previously discussed: if it has not been filed yet, I would like to ask that we wait until my individual IRCC mandamus (IMM-25909-25) receives the Respondent’s Memorandum of Argument, and then proceed with filing the CBSA mandamus. My understanding is this may help avoid any allegation of abuse of process by IRCC in the RMOA.  
If the CBSA mandamus has already been filed, that’s totally fine as well.

Thank you, and please let me know the next steps.

Kind regards,  
[Your Full Name]  
[Phone Number]  
[UCI / Client ID, if applicable]
